content.query:
-- create view calendar
CREATE view gold.calendar 
as 
SELECT * from 
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://deprojectdatalakenith1.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Calendar/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as q1

-- create view customers
CREATE view gold.customers 
as 
SELECT * from 
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://deprojectdatalakenith1.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Customers/',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) as q1
